content:
## AlphaResearch: LLM-Accelerated Algorithm Discovery

Use language models to accelerate research by discovering and implementing new algorithms automatically, augmenting scientific progress.

### Core Concept

LLM-driven system for autonomous algorithm research and implementation

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08522

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When automating algorithm discovery or accelerating research
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: AlphaResearch: Accelerating New Algorithm Discovery with Language Models
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.08522
